description_long: This is a two-story modern bank building with a prominent glass facade and a flat roof. The front features a large entrance with four glass double doors framed by tall columns, and above the entrance is a sign labeled 'OFFICE' in bold white letters. The structure is surrounded by a paved sidewalk, street lamps, and a small parking area with marked spaces. Three stylized trees and a bench are positioned along the side, adding greenery to the urban setting. The building's exterior is primarily composed of large blue-tinted windows and brown structural elements, giving it a contemporary look. The roof includes HVAC units and the overall design is clean, geometric, and functional.
description: A modern, two-story bank with a glass facade, flat roof, and prominent front entrance, surrounded by street lamps, parking, and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main glass entrance, 'OFFICE' signage, street lamps, sidewalk, and part of the parking area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the parking spaces, three trees, a bench, and the building's glass side wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back glass wall, three trees, and a grassy area with minimal architectural detail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a single tree, the building's side wall, and the continuation of the sidewalk and street.
attribute_signage: Large white 'OFFICE' text sign on the upper front facade above the main entrance, in a bold sans-serif font.
attribute_entrance_design: Main entrance consists of four large glass double doors framed by columns, with a flat canopy above and no visible decorative elements.
